case_title: AMG PUBLISHING, INC. VS. COLONY RIDGE LLC, et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMG PUBLISHING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COLONY RIDGE LLC NCM MANAGEMENT LTD. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMG PUBLISHING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NCM MANAGEMENT LTD. $14,999.07 PRINCIPAL, $1,984.00 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,353.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
